sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-04-19 08:26
- Distance: 11.7 km
- Moving time: 1:08:59
- Elapsed time: 1:10:29
- Elevation gain: 207 m
- Average heart rate: 180.7 bpm
- Max heart rate: 200 bpm
- Average watts: 196.6 W
- Average speed: 10.2 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `181.1 bpm`, ranging from `157.2` to `192.2 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `173.8 bpm` and second-half average HR was `192.0 bpm` (+18.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `157.8 spm`, with a working range of `145.8` to `161.4 spm` after excluding `4` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `155.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `157.3 spm` (+1.7 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:54 /km` across `11.694 km` in `1:08:59` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:01 /km` and second-half pace was `5:47 /km` (-13 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `180.7 bpm` average and `200 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `171.2 bpm` in the first half and `189.8 bpm` in the second (+18.6 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:08:59` out of `1:10:29` elapsed (97.9%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `5` stop segments and `0.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `222.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.6 m` and `27.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `110.8 m` in the first half and `111.4 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
